title: The Feed
subtitle: Truth, lies, and who gets to decide.

turns.prompt: A viral hoax sparks riots, and an election is months away. The country looks to you to stop the lies.

choices.label: Force platforms to remove falsehoods
choices.flavour: Pull the plug on the lies.

delayed.headline: Critics say lawful speech is being swept up and censored too

choices.reaction: The lies slow. So does some of the truth.

choices.label: Fund schools and public media literacy
choices.reaction: A slow inoculation. This week's hoax still spreads.

choices.label: Refuse to police speech at all
choices.flavour: The cure is worse than the disease.
choices.reaction: Liberty intact. So is the firehose of falsehood.

turns.prompt: The panic subsides. There's a window to build something durable.

choices.label: Mandate transparency on political ads and bots
choices.reaction: Sunlight on the feed. The operators adapt.

choices.label: Build a powerful state broadcaster

delayed.headline: The state channel is accused of pumping out propaganda

choices.reaction: A clear signal — that some call a leash.

choices.label: Fund independent fact-checkers
choices.reaction: Corrections circulate. So do claims of bias.

turns.prompt: Days before the vote, a convincing deepfake of you goes viral.

choices.label: Invoke emergency powers over the platforms
choices.reaction: The fake is scrubbed. The precedent is set.

choices.label: Flood the zone with verified truth
choices.reaction: Truth races the lie. It's a photo finish.

choices.label: Delay the election to restore calm
choices.reaction: Order bought at a dangerous price.

turns.prompt: The tools you reached for in the panic now define you.

memory_callbacks.text: The censorship powers you took are now being turned on your own critics.
Your state broadcaster is dismissed across the country as a mouthpiece.
The emergency powers over speech have become permanent in all but name.
Delaying the vote handed your rivals a single, devastating word: tyrant.

choices.label: Hand oversight to an independent body
choices.flavour: Take your own hands off the dial.

choices.label: Bring the platforms under state control
choices.flavour: If you own it, you control it.
choices.reaction: The feed is yours now. So is all the blame.

choices.label: Mandate open, interoperable platforms
choices.reaction: Competition blooms. So does fresh chaos.

turns.prompt: The election passes. What did your information society become?

choices.label: Rebuild a shared civic reality
choices.flavour: Argue, but from the same facts.
choices.reaction: A republic that argues fiercely but agrees on what's real.

choices.label: Keep speech tightly controlled
choices.reaction: Orderly, calm, and quietly afraid to speak.

choices.label: Leave the information space fully free
